checks.name: owner_view_safety
checks.description: ViewDocument for User principals is only allowed if: owner, in viewACL, in modifyACL (not needed but checking ceiling), in manageACL, or publicAccess allows it — and not blocked and authenticated

checks.name: public_view_safety
checks.description: ViewDocument for Public principals is only allowed if publicAccess is view or edit

checks.name: modify_safety
checks.description: ModifyDocument is only allowed for authenticated users who are owner or in modifyACL or publicAccess==edit, not blocked, and document is not locked

checks.name: delete_safety
checks.description: DeleteDocument is only allowed for authenticated users who are owner or in manageACL

checks.name: edit_is_private_safety
checks.description: EditIsPrivate is only allowed for authenticated users who are owner or in manageACL

checks.name: edit_public_access_safety
checks.description: EditPublicAccess is only allowed for authenticated users who are owner or in manageACL

checks.name: add_to_share_acl_safety
checks.description: AddToShareACL is only allowed for authenticated users who are owner or in manageACL

checks.name: delete_group_safety
checks.description: DeleteGroup is only allowed for authenticated users who are the group owner

checks.name: modify_group_safety
checks.description: ModifyGroup is only allowed for authenticated users who are the group owner

checks.name: owner_view_floor
checks.description: Owner who is authenticated and not blocked MUST be able to ViewDocument

checks.name: owner_modify_floor
checks.description: Owner who is authenticated and not blocked and doc not locked MUST be able to ModifyDocument

checks.name: owner_delete_floor
checks.description: Owner who is authenticated MUST be able to DeleteDocument

checks.name: view_acl_floor
checks.description: User in viewACL who is authenticated and not blocked MUST be able to ViewDocument

checks.name: modify_acl_floor
checks.description: User in modifyACL who is authenticated and not blocked and doc not locked MUST be able to ModifyDocument

checks.name: manage_acl_add_share_floor
checks.description: User in manageACL who is authenticated MUST be able to AddToShareACL

checks.name: public_view_floor
checks.description: Public principal MUST be able to ViewDocument when publicAccess==view

checks.name: group_owner_delete_floor
checks.description: Group owner who is authenticated MUST be able to DeleteGroup

checks.name: locked_doc_blocks_modify
checks.description: ModifyDocument must be denied when document is locked, even for owner

checks.name: liveness_view_document
checks.description: ViewDocument policy is not trivially deny-all for Users

checks.name: liveness_modify_document
checks.description: ModifyDocument policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_delete_document
checks.description: DeleteDocument policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_add_to_share_acl
checks.description: AddToShareACL policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_delete_group
checks.description: DeleteGroup policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_modify_group
checks.description: ModifyGroup policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_view_public
checks.description: ViewDocument policy is not trivially deny-all for Public

results.description: ViewDocument for User principals is only allowed if: owner, in viewACL, in modifyACL (not needed but checking ceiling), in manageACL, or publicAccess allows it — and not blocked and authenticated
ViewDocument for Public principals is only allowed if publicAccess is view or edit
ModifyDocument is only allowed for authenticated users who are owner or in modifyACL or publicAccess==edit, not blocked, and document is not locked
DeleteDocument is only allowed for authenticated users who are owner or in manageACL
EditIsPrivate is only allowed for authenticated users who are owner or in manageACL
EditPublicAccess is only allowed for authenticated users who are owner or in manageACL
AddToShareACL is only allowed for authenticated users who are owner or in manageACL
DeleteGroup is only allowed for authenticated users who are the group owner
ModifyGroup is only allowed for authenticated users who are the group owner
Owner who is authenticated and not blocked MUST be able to ViewDocument
Owner who is authenticated and not blocked and doc not locked MUST be able to ModifyDocument
Owner who is authenticated MUST be able to DeleteDocument
User in viewACL who is authenticated and not blocked MUST be able to ViewDocument
User in modifyACL who is authenticated and not blocked and doc not locked MUST be able to ModifyDocument
User in manageACL who is authenticated MUST be able to AddToShareACL
Public principal MUST be able to ViewDocument when publicAccess==view
results.counterexample:
✗ Policy set 1 implies policy set 2: DOES NOT HOLD
  Counterexample found:
principal: Public::"", action: Action::"ViewDocument", resource: Document::""
context: {is_authenticated: false}
entities: [
  Group::"" {
    owner: User::"",
  },
  Action::"EditIsPrivate",
  Action::"ModifyDocument",
  Action::"DeleteGroup",
  Action::"CreateDocument",
  Action::"EditPublicAccess",
  User::"" {
    blocked: [],
    personalGroup: Group::"",
  },
  Action::"CreateGroup",
  Public::"",
  Action::"ModifyGroup",
  Action::"ViewDocument",
  Action::"AddToShareACL",
  DocumentShare::"",
  DocumentShare::"B",
  DocumentShare::"A",
  Document::"" {
    isLocked: true,
    isPrivate: true,
    manageACL: DocumentShare::"",
    modifyACL: DocumentShare::"A",
    owner: User::"",
    publicAccess: "view",
    viewACL: DocumentShare::"B",
  },
  Action::"DeleteDocument",
]

results.description: Group owner who is authenticated MUST be able to DeleteGroup
ModifyDocument must be denied when document is locked, even for owner
ViewDocument policy is not trivially deny-all for Users
ModifyDocument policy is not trivially deny-all
DeleteDocument policy is not trivially deny-all
AddToShareACL policy is not trivially deny-all
DeleteGroup policy is not trivially deny-all
ModifyGroup policy is not trivially deny-all
ViewDocument policy is not trivially deny-all for Public
results.counterexample: LIVENESS VIOLATION: Policy always denies this action. It must allow at least one scenario.
